meta.title: Tokusagamine Ski Resort
meta.description: Honshu's westernmost 100% natural-snow ski area. Track the phantom hill and Laputa backcountry in real time.

hero.eyebrow: Ato, Yamaguchi City · westernmost in Honshu
hero.title:
Tokusagamine
Ski Resort
hero.tagline: Experience the westernmost 100% natural snow resort in Honshu and the ultimate "Laputa" backcountry.

sanctuary.title:
Zero man-made snow—
Honshu's far west.
sanctuary.lead: Unlike Megahira or Kurobuchi mega-resorts—no snow guns, 100% natural snow only. Quiet local vibe and ¥4,100 day tickets are the draw.
sanctuary.noticeBody: "Never know when it's open"—own the weather dependency, push premium pricing right after storms, and win with real-time "phantom hill" updates.
sanctuary.imgAlt: Untouched Laputa zone—powder and views you wouldn't expect in Yamaguchi

primary.title: Laputa × natural powder
primary.lead: Hike-up "Laputa" above the lift—~900 m descents and views to the Japan Sea. A magnet for core riders tired of groomed mega-resorts.
primary.imgAlt: Powder slope at Tokusagamine—untouched natural snow

secondary.title: Sled & family zone
secondary.lead: The sled hill beside the pair lift fills on weekends—one of Yamaguchi's few family snow-play spots.

pass.title:
Harvest demand
right after storms.
pass.lead: Dynamic pricing tied to snowfall forecasts—premium day tickets after fresh snow, plus Atou wagyu lunch and Ganjoju onsen bundled passes.
pass.imgAlt: Tokusagamine Wood Park—year-round ski and camp hub

hike.title:
Brand the
Laputa zone.
hike.lead: Reframe the hike-up upper slopes as guided premium BC tours—beacon rental included (safety management and local coordination required).
hike.leadCurry: After laps, head to Atou—Atou wagyu at Jyurian or local lunch at LANDMARK. instead of curry and udon only on the hill.
hike.imgAlt: Atou wagyu steak—brand beef lunch in the highlands

tour.title:
One day of
snow and hot springs.
tour.lead: Not ski-only—loop Atou wagyu, rare carbonated springs, and Tsuwano sights.

05.title: Tsuwano
05.body: Little Kyoto of San'in · local products (optional)

sanctuary.title: Phantom hill guide
sanctuary.body: ~10 open days per season—flip instability into guerrilla marketing and live cameras to capture same-day bookings from Yamaguchi day-trippers.

workation.title: Year-round wood park hub
workation.body: MTB downhill, auto camp, paragliding—cover winter revenue swings with green-season cash flow at the Tokusagamine mountain hub.

lake.title: Atou food & onsen tie-in
lake.body: Limited hill food becomes a strength—coupons to nearby restaurants and onsen lift area-wide spend.

access.note: Chugoku Expwy · ~45 min from Shino IC · weekend parking ¥500 (free after 3 p.m.) · 400 spaces
access.rentacarLink: 山口宇部空港でレンタカー予約
access.rentacarNote: スカイチケット（外部サイト）
access.rentacarHint: 十種ヶ峰スキー場周辺のドライブ向け
